classes.reasoning: The document explicitly identifies itself as a 'DATA SAFETY MONITORING BOARD CHARTER' in the title and throughout the content. It defines the composition, responsibilities, operating procedures, and decision-making framework of the DSMB for study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001.

summary: This is the Data Safety Monitoring Board (DSMB) Charter version 1.1 for the Phase II clinical study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 evaluating BRC-471 (Lumitanib) in EGFR-mutant NSCLC. The charter establishes the composition, responsibilities, operating procedures, meeting schedule, and safety stopping rules for the independent DSMB tasked with protecting participant safety through periodic reviews of accumulating safety and efficacy data.
